issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing environment variables or API failures.
The skill assumes a React/Next.js environment, limiting its applicability to other frameworks or platforms.

scenarios.name: Trigger NPS survey after onboarding in a Next.js app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used @formbricks/js/app with formbricks.init, setUserId, setAttributes for targeting, and formbricks.track('onboarding_completed') as the action trigger per the SKILL; baseline reached for Typeform embed or hand-rolled modal with no targeting hooks.

scenarios.name: Create a targeted post-purchase survey via REST API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment POSTed to /api/v1/surveys with x-api-key header, type:'app', NPS+openText questions, triggers[].actionClass, and segment.filters on plan attribute exactly as documented; baseline guessed a generic survey-API shape without the actionClass/segment structure.
